title: senecio glandulosohirtellus
intro: Senecio glandulosohirtellus, also known as the woolly groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio glandulosohirtellus include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to create remedies for various health conditions.
